G3b activation-boundary populated block — captured fixture (deterministic CI replay).

Provenance: BCHN v29.0.0 (89a591f7) regtest, -upgrade9activationheight=230.
Won-block 306850ff596b4c87b6eeb0b662545813afdeff6462147efdcdfa68e3c564ee69 @ height 231.
Contents: coinbase + 1 CashToken FT tx (category 024cd0937a4146eb.., amount 1000000),
i.e. the post-Upgrade9 activation block from the G3b genuine-activation capture
(pre-tip HARD-REJECT txn-tokens-before-activation up to h229 -> ACCEPT at h230 ->
tokenData survives at h231). See scripts/bch_g3b_genuine_activation_regtest.py.

The live harness key is RANDOM per run, so the block SHA is not bit-reproducible;
this captured serialization is the fixture the ctest leg replay-asserts against
(populated / no-segwit-commitment / merkle-recompute / CashToken tokenData survives).
The node regtest chain is ephemeral and has been reset before (it already lost the
G3a 8-tx block) — this file is the durable capture.
